findings.location: s1 — データベースコネクション名の使用例 code block
findings.description: The source explicitly shows three equivalent forms for registering an unnamed connection, but the knowledge file code block omits the third form `DbConnectionContext.setConnection("transaction", connection1)`. The source comment says 'DbConnectionContext.setConnection(TransactionContext.DEFAULT_TRANSACTION_CONTEXT_KEY, connection1)' and 'DbConnectionContext.setConnection("transaction", connection1)' are both equivalent to the unnamed registration.

findings.location: s2 — トランザクション名の使用例 code block
findings.description: The source includes an important comment explaining when application code (as opposed to framework code) needs to call getTransaction: specifically when processing must be committed even on abnormal termination (exception). This guidance on the application-level use case for the API is absent from the knowledge file.
findings.source_evidence:
// アプリケーションで、トランザクションが必要となるケースは、
// 例外発生時(異常終了)であっても処理を確定する必要がある場合である。
